title: Noah Begins to Fall
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is noah begins to fall.
scene: The scene follows noah begins to fall, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was you who betrayed me first, decken.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I saw this ship black out the sky above the island, I thought my life might be over.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But your idea of breaking the bubble around the island is a good one, I'll admit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The island will perish, certainly, but the fish-man district will remain.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you die here and now, your ability's effect will vanish...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This ship will once more plummet down towards the island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The most important thing right now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is to ensure the destruction of that troublesome straw hat crew!! Thousands of my allies will perish alongside them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...but slaves can always be easily replaced!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You mean to kill them all?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do like the sound of that, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Now then, before this ship begins to fall...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I had better dispose of Shirahoshii.

summary: Noah Begins to Fall. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
